source_pr.title: planner: support column range partition pruning for builtin function IN
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #26739

Problem Summary: planner: support column range partition pruning for builtin function IN

### What is changed and how it works?

Convert IN to EQ and then prune them.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
planner: support column range partition pruning for builtin function IN
```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery(`select id from t1 where dt in ('2020-11-27','2020-11-28') order by id`).Check(testkit.Rows("3", "4")) (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery(`select id from t1 where dt in ('2020-11-27','2020-11-28') order by id`).Check(testkit.Rows("3", "4")) (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery(`select id from t1 where dt in ('2020-11-27','2020-11-28') order by id`).Check(testkit.Rows("3", "4")) (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
